name: sdd-workflow
description: Structured Design-Driven workflow for AI agents — plan tasks with ADRs and diagrams, implement phase-by-phase using Ralph loop, and verify plan-vs-implementation parity. Works with Copilot, Claude Code, or any agent CLI.
author: renre-kit

actions.name: list-tasks
actions.description: List all SDD tasks with phases, grouped by recency

actions.name: get-task
actions.description: Get a single task with file tree

actions.name: read-file
actions.description: Read a markdown file from a task directory

actions.name: review
actions.description: Submit a file for LLM review with inline comments

actions.name: check-mtime
actions.description: Check file modification time for change detection

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Structured planning: analyze context, create ADRs/diagrams, build phased plan with validation gates. Use when the user needs to plan a feature, task, or project.

skills.name: implement
skills.description: Ralph loop implementation: runs AI agent in a self-correcting while loop per phase until all gates (lint, duplication, tests, plan-vs-implementation) pass. Default agent: copilot --yolo.

skills.name: check
skills.description: Verify plan-vs-implementation parity across all phases — lint, duplication, complexity, and completeness checks. Fixes all issues found.

scripts.name: sdd-implement.sh
scripts.description: Ralph loop driver — runs AI agent + validation gates in a while loop per phase.

scripts.name: sdd-check.sh
scripts.description: Plan-vs-implementation verification — audits all phases and fixes issues.

scripts.name: lib/gates.sh
scripts.description: Shared validation gate runners (lint, duplication, tests).

scripts.name: lib/prompt-builder.sh
scripts.description: Constructs agent prompts from SDD plan and ADR files.
